title: The Children of Elbaf Panic
description: On pages 13–13, this part follows Unknown person #13 as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll let it up once those runts reach the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think they'll be able to get them back?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To love is to inevitably hurt one another.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah't that right, gunko? What scares you the host? Break next
